channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Singapore
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Singapore — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Chainsmoker Cat — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.8 · Must watch — Catgirl Yani struggles to pay her rent and keep a job while feeding her smoking habit. As her loved ones' concerns grow, she must rethink her future.

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 9.0 · Must watch — Sasaki is an overworked salaryman drifting through the corporate grind, sustained by cigarettes and the cheerful service and smile of Yamada, the clerk at his…

item.title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Japanese · ★ 9.0 · Must watch — 2029, a near-future Japan. The full cyborg Motoko Kusanagi envisions a task force that preemptively strikes emerging threats.

item.title: Kung Fu Soccer — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · Just released — verdict soon — The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown!

item.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world.

item.title: Idhayam Murali — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.7 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: The Eternal Fragrance — Viu
item.description: Viu · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals,…

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max
item.description: HBO Max · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Dog Man — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — Once the frontman of rock band Mazhi Go, Chou Ko-chieh rode his looks and raw talent to instant superstardom.
